ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the official team website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing handles for various social media platforms */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_names" TEXT /* JSON array of names of assistant coaches */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* JSON array of team colors */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the performance is recorded */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "home_record" REAL /* Home record of the team */,
  "road_record" REAL /* Road record of the team */,
  "last_10_games" REAL /* Performance in the last 10 games */,
  "current_streak" INTEGER /* Current winning or losing streak */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team in the league */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team in the conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team in the division */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances in the current season */,
  "playoff_rounds_won" INTEGER /* Number of playoff rounds won in the current season */,
  "last_playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Year of the last playoff appearance */,
  "all_star_players" TEXT /* JSON array of player IDs who have been selected for the All-Star Game */,
  "championships_won" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the main referee */,
  "assistant_referees" TEXT /* JSON array of names of assistant referees */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of stadium capacity filled */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of weather conditions during the match */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* JSON array of player IDs who were injured during the match */,
  "player_of_the_game" INTEGER /* Player ID of the player of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "current_team" TEXT /* Name of the current team (redundant but useful for quick lookups) */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* JSON array of names of previous teams the player has played for */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the injury (if applicable) */,
  "contract_expiry" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "endorsements" TEXT /* JSON array of endorsement deals */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing handles for various social media platforms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fan */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the fan is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the fan is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the fan */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan's favorite team */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the fan joined the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the fan's last activity on the platform */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned through engagement activities */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the fan to join */,
  "referral_count" INTEGER /* Number of fans referred by this fan */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fans_favorite_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., tweet, like, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement (e.g., number of likes, shares) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for engagement (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the engagement based on its type and value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highlight */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., top play, game-winning shot) */,
  "highlight_description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the highlight */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the highlight */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the highlight has received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the highlight has received */,
  "highlight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the highlight in seconds */,
  "highlight_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the highlight (e.g., HD, SD) */,
  "highlight_tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags associated with the highlight */,
  "highlight_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the highlight */,
  "highlight_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the highlight */,
  "highlight_downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the highlight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, journalist) */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 10 for admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the account is locked */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or profile description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., team performance, player statistics) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the access request in milliseconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
